difficulty_options.title: Extra starting materials
difficulty_options.tooltip: Extra starting materials and materials returned when scrapping ruined buildings. Affects also extra size of island's crude oil deposits.

difficulty_options.title: Fuel consumption
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects fuel consumption of vehicles and cargo ships.

difficulty_options.title: Rainwater yield
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects how much water is generated from rain.

difficulty_options.title: Base health
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects the baseline health of your population.

difficulty_options.title: Ore mining yield
difficulty_options.tooltip: Increases or reduces the mined amount of ores and sand. If increased, excavators will mine more ore from the same-sized deposit compared to what they would mine for standard setting.

difficulty_options.title: Good & services consumption
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects how much services and goods are consumed by your population (does not include food).

difficulty_options.title: Food consumption
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects how much food is consumed by your population.

difficulty_options.title: World mines deposits
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects size of deposits in the world mines (for instance quartz mines or oil rigs).

difficulty_options.title: Farms yield
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects yield of all farms and greenhouses.

difficulty_options.title: Unity generation
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects how much Unity is produced in settlements.

difficulty_options.title: Construction costs
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects construction costs of entities such as machines, building, vehicles.

difficulty_options.title: Power for belts & storages
difficulty_options.tooltip: Determines whether belts & storages will consume power and how. If power is set to 'Always consume', belts & storages will NOT work when low on power. If set to 'Consume if can', power is consumed with the highest priority but belts & storages will still work despite having no power. Finally, power consumption for belts & storages can be disabled entirely.

difficulty_options.title: Trees growth speed
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects how fast trees grow.

difficulty_options.title: Contracts profitability
difficulty_options.tooltip: Extra free goods received when trading via contracts.

difficulty_options.title: Deconstruction refund
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects how much material is returned back when deconstructing buildings, machines and vehicles.

difficulty_options.title: Research cost
difficulty_options.tooltip: Adjusts the amount of time and resources required for each research task.

difficulty_options.title: Quick actions cost
difficulty_options.tooltip: Adjusts the Unity cost for quick actions, like quick delivery

difficulty_options.title: Mixed ore sorting
difficulty_options.tooltip: If enabled, mined mixed materials in trucks must be processed at a dedicated sorting facility

difficulty_options.title: Solar power production
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects how much electricity is generated by solar panels

difficulty_options.title: Pollution impact
difficulty_options.tooltip: Affects pollution intensity.
